def negative_test_helpers_shipped_inside_production_package_path():
    rule_id = "test_helpers_shipped_inside_production_package_path"
    family = "packaging"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag test-only helpers living under the production import path."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
